name: Risotto with Mozzarella & Hot Pepper Flakes
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red bell pepper, seeded and finely chopped
6 sun-dried tomatoes packed in oil, drained and slivered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or pot, heat the olive oil and butter over medium heat until hot. Add the onion and red pepper; sauté for 5 minutes. Add the garlic and sauté an additional minute.
2. Stir in the rice and hot pepper flakes. Cook, stirring, for 2 minutes. Slowly start to add the liquid, about a ladleful at a time. Cook, covered, over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until the liquid has been absorbed each time before adding the next ladleful. Repeat the cooking process until all the liquid is absorbed, about 10 minutes.
3. Uncover and stir in the olives and sun-dried tomatoes. Continue to add the liquid and stir often. The risotto should cook for about 30 minutes total. (The finished risotto should be creamy with a little chewiness at the center of the rice.)
4. Stir in the mozzarella, parsley, and Parmesan cheese until the cheese has melted.
